h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font with significant vertical whitespace above and below.

h2.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, visually identical to h1, used for major topical sections.

h3.visual_description: White, italicized serif font nested within a solid dark blue rectangular callout block.
h3.example_text: Reflection & Discussion Question 1: Taking Stock of What You Already Know

visual_matchers.pattern: Solid dark blue rectangular background with white italicized text
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Interactive prompt or discussion question callout

visual_matchers.pattern: [Number] | [Text] at the bottom of the page
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Page footer containing page number and section title

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text consisting of page numbers and the recurring string 'Instructor Resources'.
